experience.title: Front End Developer at Active One technologies
highlights: Led the development of an AI-assisted technical assessment platform designed to evaluate and benchmark modern AI-augmented coding workflows for developers and hiring teams.
Engineered a smart university information platform that aggregates, verifies, and distributes real-time academic updates, announcements, and institutional resources for students.
Built a biometric and QR-enabled attendance management system with real-time software-to-hardware communication, offline synchronization, and mobile-based verification workflows.
Developed scalable backend systems, authentication services, and deployment infrastructure for production-grade B2B and consumer-facing applications.
Contributed across architecture, infrastructure, frontend, backend, and deployment using technologies including Go, React Native, Next.js, and Docker.

experience.title: Software Engineer | LLMTrainer at Turing
highlights: Conducted in-depth LLM (Large Language Model) training focused on Python and React development tasks, contributing to enhanced model performance, reasoning accuracy, and code generation quality.

Applied techniques such as Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF), Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT), and prompt engineering to align model outputs with developer expectations and real-world coding patterns.
Executed rigorous code reviews and model output verification, ensuring adherence to modern programming standards, best practices, and bug-free logic across diverse project scenarios.
Provided detailed feedback and edge-case evaluations to fine-tune model behavior and response accuracy across real-world coding challenges.
Improved the clarity and consistency of user-assistant interactions, leading to a more intuitive and trustworthy developer experience.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to align training outputs with evolving product goals and quality benchmarks.

experience.title: Lead Frontend Engineer at Hardcore Biometric Systems
highlights: Led the transition of five mission-critical applications used by a national law enforcement agency to a Micro Frontend architecture, improving modularity, scalability, and reuse across applications serving millions of users.

Championed the rewrite of a complex legacy frontend supporting high-volume, real-time operational workflows, achieving major performance and scalability improvements and reducing production bugs by over 90%.
Decomposed a tightly coupled frontend into independently deployable modules, enabling parallel development, lowering release risk, and improving long-term maintainability.
Designed and implemented event-driven frontend integrations, consuming real-time event streams to keep user interfaces synchronized with backend state and time-sensitive operations.
Collaborated closely with backend engineers integrating Java-based services and APIs, defining event contracts, data models, and interface boundaries for reliable distributed communication.

Built and maintained enterprise content management capabilities, including advanced canvas manipulation, structured content ingestion, content digest generation, and rendering pipelines for large-scale operational data.
Influenced UI and UX architecture by establishing reusable component patterns, improving accessibility, responsiveness, and visual consistency across multiple applications.
Implemented automated testing using Jest, Vitest, and Cypress, increasing release confidence and frontend reliability at national scale.
Managed feature releases, patches, and hotfixes through CI/CD pipelines, using versioned deployment strategies to support safe rollouts and rapid rollback.
Facilitated agile ceremonies including sprint planning, daily stand-ups, and retrospectives, improving delivery consistency and team throughput across distributed teams.
Conducted in-depth code reviews and applied secure coding standards, contributing to security-focused reviews for critical public-sector systems.
Used Bitbucket, Jira, Confluence, and other Atlassian tools to manage source control, documentation, issue tracking, and cross-team collaboration.
Mentored interns and junior engineers, providing guidance on frontend architecture, best practices, and professional development.

experience.title: Software Engineer at Tribesquare, Inc
highlights: Developed and maintained responsive web applications using React, Typescript, ES6+, HTML5, CSS3 and python(Django).
Converted UI and UX designs from Figma and into reusable and accessible frontend components.
Implemented payment gateways and third-party services using Stripe, Paystack, REST APIs, and Axios.
Implemented interactive UI features using HTML5 Canvas and scroll-based animations with AOS and CSS.
Integrated Google Analytics tools for user behavior insights.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams using Git, GitHub, and Agile Scrum workflows.
Restructured and further advanced existing database structure, and redeploy to boost database performance.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer at DEDA Hospital
highlights: Developed and maintained frontend web applications using Vue.js, JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3, and Python delivering responsive interfaces for Health Management Systems (HMS).
Integrated healthcare-related third-party services including HL7/FHIR-based APIs, Stripe, Paystack, and SMS/Email gateway (SendGrid) to support payments, notifications, and patient communications.
Implemented RESTful APIs, enabling patient records, appointments, billing, and reporting workflows.
Implemented frontend integration practices aligned with health data security and compliance standards, including secure authentication flows, role-based access (RBAC), and protected data handling.
Enhanced the codebase through refactoring, performance optimization, and UI improvements to ensure reliability, maintainability, and a smooth user experience in clinical environments.
Dockerized deployments in kubernetes environment.
Developed and organised HMS datasets using SQLAlchemy ORM and postgres database.

experience.title: Frontend Developer at TIIDELAB Initiative
highlights: Learned and applied core frontend development concepts using React, JavaScript (ES6), HTML5, and CSS3.
Developed foundational skills in component-based architecture, state management, and UI structuring under mentorship.
Built responsive user interfaces from Figma designs, strengthening attention to detail and usability.
Integrated basic REST APIs using Axios, improving understanding of frontend-backend data flow.
Wrote introductory tests using Jest and React Testing Library to practice debugging and code quality.
Demonstrated leadership and initiative by supporting peers, taking ownership of small tasks, and contributing ideas during team sessions.
Improved presentation and public speaking skills by explaining features, demoing work, and participating in team reviews and stand-ups.
Strengthened soft skills including communication, collaboration, time management, and adaptability within an agile environment.
